title: added healthcheck to ps command
body:
<!--
Thanks for sending a pull request!

Please make sure you've read our contributing guidelines and how to submit a pull request (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md#submitting-pull-requests).

In case you're only changing docs, make sure to prefix the pull-request title with "[CI:DOCS]".  That will prevent functional tests from running and save time and energy.
-->
Added health-check status to STATUS field of podman ps command

Fixes #11527 


Signed-off-by: Sankalp  Rangare <sankalprangare786@gmail.com>

comments.body: Looks like your PR includes a Signed-off-by line, but the commit message does not; can you add one with `git commit --amend -s` and re-push?
Edit: sorry, wrong issue - your validation issue does not require Buildah fixes

@sankalp-r: Cannot trigger testing until a trusted user reviews the PR and leaves an `/ok-to-test` message.

<details>

In response to [this](https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/11609#issuecomment-921586383):

>/retest 


Instructions for interacting with me using PR comments are available [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/pull-requests.md).  If you have questions or suggestions related to my behavior, please file an issue against the [kubernetes/test-infra](https://github.com/kubernetes/test-infra/issues/new?title=Prow%20issue:) repository.
</details>
Could you add a test,  Probbaly just enhance one of the health check tests to see if you field shows up.
Other than prior comments, changes LGTM
I've rerun the fedora-34 root host test, it looked like a flake.

[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *rhatdan*, *sankalp-r* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [rhatdan] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
